metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for gowth-mem — global topic-organized memory layer for Claude Code.

plugins.name: gowth-mem
plugins.description: Persistent topic-organized memory for Claude Code. Global ~/.gowth-mem/ synced across machines via your own git remote. Auto pull/push around /compact, multi-session safe via fcntl locks, AI-mediated conflict resolution, hybrid FTS5+vector recall.
